CHINATOWN
Our Story

New Location.
Same Legend.

Chinatown has been Islamabad's most beloved Chinese restaurant for years — and now at Blue Area's D-Chowk, we bring the same team, same fire, and same authentic Szechuan recipes to a brand new home.

From hand-folded dumplings to the aromatic Firepot loaded with prawns, beef, squid and more — every dish honours a culinary tradition spanning centuries. This is Chinese food, done right.

ALL ITEMS
House Specialty

The China Town Firepot.

A simmering pot of tradition — sliced beef, chicken, prawns, squid, bean curd, fresh vegetables and Chinese rice noodles, all cooked in our signature Szechuan broth right at your table. An experience, not just a meal.

Single Serving
Rs 2,890
Beef, chicken, prawns, squid, bean curd, vegetables & noodles
Family Serving
Rs 9,500
Full family-sized authentic Ho Ko firepot with all ingredients
Family Deal
Rs 4,900
1 rice · 1 chow mein · 2 chicken gravies · 1L soft drink
Special Soup
Rs 2,090
Mushrooms, shrimps, chicken, beef & fresh vegetables
Guest Words

What They Say

★★★★★

Excellent food and excellent environment. Start with their soups — they are really good. A place that never disappoints and keeps you coming back for more.

S
Saad Zafar
Local Guide · 101 reviews · 2,578 photos
★★★★★

Better than other Chinese competitors in the market when it comes to quality and taste. The Szechuan chicken tasted super good. Hot and sour soup is also excellent. Staff is attentive and accommodating.

M
Muhammed Saad Khan
Local Guide · 50 reviews
★★★★★

Honestly yum! Went there on my birthday. Had American suey noodles, dumplings — both fried and steamed — and fish. My favourite was the dumplings. An absolute delight from start to finish.

R
Spicy Ramen
Local Guide · 41 reviews
★★★★★

Good food, clean restaurant and really good service. Attentive staff. The best Chinese food in Islamabad — their chowmein is to die for and the rest of the food is equally amazing.

A
Anita Karimi
Local Guide · 169 reviews · 315 photos
★★★★★

Impeccable food and service — highly recommended! A very intimate place but great food. The tamarind fish was great! Same great taste and staff is nice and cooperative every single time.
